DISCOVERY 301, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS FURTHER RESPONSES TO DEFENDANTS REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE. THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION IN PART AND DENIES IT IN PART. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING) COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-26-2025 Continued To Nov-09-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2024 Set For Trial On Dec-08-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Further Responses To Defendants Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Mar-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Further Responses To Defendants Request For Production Of Documents, Set One.

The City and County of San Francisco seeks an order requiring plaintiff Sandra Teixeira to amend certain RFP responses to specify which documents are responsive to which requests. Teixeira objects. The court grants the motion in part and denies it in part. (see word minutes for complete ruling)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2024 Set For Trial On May-19-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Mar-27-2024 Off Calendar
